home.title: DondeAnime - Where to watch anime in Spanish streaming markets
home.description: Find where to watch every anime on Crunchyroll, Netflix, Prime Video and other platforms. Updated catalog for Spain, Mexico, Argentina, Colombia and Chile.
home.hero.subtitle: Updated catalog of premieres and platforms in Spain, Mexico, Argentina, Colombia and Chile.
faq.legal.question: Where can I watch anime online legally?
faq.legal.answer: You can check licensed platforms such as Crunchyroll, Netflix, Prime Video, Disney+ and HBO Max. DondeAnime matches each anime with the platforms detected by country.
faq.free.question: Where can I watch anime legally for free?
faq.free.answer: Some platforms publish free episodes or ad-supported catalogs depending on the country. When a provider is listed as free or included with streaming, DondeAnime shows it on the anime page.
faq.platform.question: Which platform has the most anime?
faq.platform.answer: It depends on the country and the current catalog. Crunchyroll often gathers a large anime catalog, but Netflix, Prime Video and other platforms change their licenses often.
faq.update.question: How often is the catalog updated?
faq.update.answer: The catalog is updated automatically with AniList and TMDb data. Public pages are regenerated when relevant anime or availability changes happen.
faq.unavailable.question: Why is an anime not available in my country?
faq.unavailable.answer: Streaming licenses change by region. An anime may be available in another country, arrive later, or have no detected provider yet.

legal.privacy.title: Privacy - DondeAnime
legal.privacy.heading: Privacy
legal.privacy.paragraph1: DondeAnime stores your email only if you create an availability alert or subscribe to the newsletter. We use it to send the confirmation and, if you confirm, the notices you requested.
legal.privacy.paragraph2: We store the email, confirmation date, alerts created, newsletter subscription and unsubscribe date if you cancel. We do not sell or share this data.
legal.privacy.paragraph3: Every alert email includes one link to unsubscribe and another to delete your alert data.
legal.privacy.paragraph4: For any access, correction or deletion request, you can also write to contacto@dondeanime.com.
legal.affiliates.title: Affiliate links - DondeAnime
legal.affiliates.description: Information about affiliate links on DondeAnime.
legal.affiliates.heading: Affiliate links
legal.affiliates.paragraph1: DondeAnime may include affiliate links to streaming platforms or partner stores. If you sign up or buy through those links, we may receive a commission at no extra cost to you.
legal.affiliates.paragraph2: Affiliate links do not change the order of providers. Availability is based on TMDb data, and visible platforms are filtered with the same rules for every user.
legal.affiliates.paragraph3: When an affiliate link exists for a platform and country, we use it on the external button. If it does not exist, the button points to the platform's generic link.
